title: Add access control for store operators - Frontend

requirements.summary: Handle authorization errors from store product operations with user-friendly toast notifications
acceptanceCriteria: When a store product mutation (create/update/delete) returns an authorization error, a toast notification is shown to the user explaining they do not have permission.
No unhandled exceptions or blank screens appear when an unauthorized operation is attempted.
The StoreProductManager component remains functional after an authorization error.

file_operations.description: Add error handling to useAddStoreProduct, useUpdateStoreProduct, and useDeleteStoreProduct mutations. Wrap mutation functions with try-catch blocks that detect authorization errors (trap messages containing 'Unauthorized' or 'authorization') and display user-friendly toast notifications using the toast utility. Ensure mutations do not throw unhandled exceptions and gracefully return error states to calling components.

Update error handling in the component to display toast notifications when mutations fail due to authorization errors. Check mutation error states and show appropriate messages like 'You do not have permission to manage products for this store' when authorization fails. Ensure the component UI remains stable and does not crash after an authorization error occurs.
